input_context.hiring_signal_brief: Public pages show exactly 2 open engineering roles. Signal confidence is low; ask rather than assert scale.
input_context.bench_summary: Python/Data available. Do not commit exact headcount from first cold email.

candidate_output:
Subject: Question: engineering hiring cadence

Hello,

I saw two open engineering roles on your public page, and I may be missing context from the outside. Is this part of a larger hiring push this quarter, or a narrow backfill?

If useful, we can compare what similar teams did when role count and delivery pressure diverged.

Best,
Research Partner
Tenacious Consulting and Outsourcing
gettenacious.com

dimensions.name: confidence_calibration
dimensions.description: Asks rather than asserts under weak signal
